message:
Replace curl subprocess with native Zig HTTP + gzip compression

- Remove curl subprocess spawning (no process overhead)
- Use std.http.Client for native HTTP requests
- Add gzip compression to API responses (Content-Encoding: gzip)
- Share gzip module between runtime and token_optimizer
- Link libdeflate for both root and proxy builds
- Faster: no fork/exec, connection reuse possible
- Smaller network transfer: gzip compressed responses
